# pangolin_api_key (Resource)

Manages a Pangolin API key. The secret value is only available at creation time.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pangolin_api_key" "example" {
  name = "ci-cd-key"
}

output "api_key_secret" {
  value     = pangolin_api_key.example.secret
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the API key.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The API key ID.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) The API key secret. Only available at creation time; stored in state.
